project.description: Runs the "deploy-auth-hpds.sh" script on the Auth HPDS EC2 server.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DATA_S3_OBJECT_KEY
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional. Setting this value will update related files, folders, datasets, etc.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GENOMIC_DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional. Setting this value will update related files, folders, datasets, etc.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -euo pipefail
# ----------------------------- # Load shared bash functions # ----------------------------- source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" echo "Loading bash functions from: ${source_scripts_folder}" ls -la "${source_scripts_folder}"
shopt -s nullglob for script_file in "${source_scripts_folder}"*.sh; do chmod +x "${script_file}" || true if [[ -f "${script_file}" && -x "${script_file}" ]]; then echo "sourcing ${script_file}" # shellcheck source=/dev/null source "${script_file}" fi done shopt -u nullglob
# Fail fast if the core functions weren't loaded for fn in assume_role wait_for_command wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs reset_role; do if ! command -v "${fn}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ERROR: required function '${fn}' is not loaded from ${source_scripts_folder}" >&2 exit 1 fi done
# Only require what is truly required to find the instance + state : "${TARGET_STACK:?TARGET_STACK is required}" : "${STACK_S3_BUCKET:?STACK_S3_BUCKET is required}"
# Allow empty values for optional Jenkins parameters by defaulting to "" DATA_S3_OBJECT_KEY="${DATA_S3_OBJECT_KEY:-""}" GENOMIC_DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY="${GENOMIC_DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY:-""}"
assume_role
# ----------------------------- # Download terraform state # ----------------------------- echo "Download terraform.tfstate file for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" aws s3 cp "s3://${STACK_S3_BUCKET}/deployment_state_metadata/${TARGET_STACK}/terraform.tfstate" "terraform.tfstate"
# ----------------------------- # Extract Auth HPDS EC2 instance ID # ----------------------------- echo "Extract HPDS instance ID for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" auth_hpds_instance_id="$(jq -r '.outputs["hpds-ec2-auth-id"].value // empty' terraform.tfstate)"
if [[ -z "${auth_hpds_instance_id}" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Could not extract auth_hpds_instance_id from terraform.tfstate (.outputs[\"hpds-ec2-auth-id\"].value)" >&2 exit 1 fi
echo "Auth HPDS Instance ID: ${auth_hpds_instance_id}"
# ----------------------------- # Build remote command # ----------------------------- update_auth_hpds_container=$( cat <<EOF sudo /opt/picsure/deploy-auth-hpds.sh \ --stack_s3_bucket "${STACK_S3_BUCKET}" \ --dataset_s3_object_key "${DATA_S3_OBJECT_KEY}" \ --genomic_dataset_s3_object_key "${GENOMIC_DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY}" \ --target_stack "${TARGET_STACK}" EOF )
echo "${update_auth_hpds_container}"
# SSM parameters must be: {"commands":["..."]} update_auth_hpds_container_json="$(jq -n --arg cmd "${update_auth_hpds_container}" '{commands: [$cmd]}')"
command_id="$( aws ssm send-command \ --instance-ids "${auth_hpds_instance_id}" \ --document-name "AWS-RunShellScript" \ --comment "Deploy Auth HPDS" \ --parameters "${update_auth_hpds_container_json}" \ --query "Command.CommandId" \ --output text )"
wait_for_command "${command_id}" "${auth_hpds_instance_id}" wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs "${auth_hpds_instance_id}" "auth-hpds"
reset_role
